SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_DSB_LTSS 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_DSB_LTSS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: There is a record for a beneficiary in this supplemental file if the beneficiary participated in the LTSS 
program in any month in the calendar year.
